rfair 0.1.0
  • Reference
    • Beyond F-UJI: reuse, sensitivity, hygiene, and FAIR-TLC
    • Illustrating and interpreting a FAIR assessment
    • How rfair works: methodology and architecture
  • Web app

Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Ahmad Sofi-Mahmudi. Author, maintainer.

  • Steffen Neumann. Contributor.
    Author of the original rfuji F-UJI API client that rfair grew from

  • PANGAEA. Copyright holder.
    Copyright holder of the F-UJI service whose metrics rfair reimplements

Citation

Source: inst/CITATION

Sofi-Mahmudi A, Neumann S (2026). rfair: Native R FAIR Assessment Metrics. doi:10.5281/zenodo.20775127. R package version 0.1.0, https://github.com/choxos/rfair. 

@Manual{,
  title = {rfair: Native R FAIR Assessment Metrics},
  author = {Ahmad Sofi-Mahmudi and Steffen Neumann},
  year = {2026},
  version = {0.1.0},
  doi = {10.5281/zenodo.20775127},
  url = {https://github.com/choxos/rfair},
